chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3006 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on CMA No.13803/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.13242/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 02.10.2025 Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the respondents 3 & 4. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Parawise reply filed by the department is taken on record. Per learned counsel for the respondents, matter pertains to a show cause notice that has primarily been assailed in the writ jurisdiction. Dr. Shah Nawaz places reliance upon judgment in the case of Jahangir Khan Tareen1, approved in Judgment dated 15.09.2022 rendered in DCIR vs. Digicom Trading (CA 2019 of 2016) and further states that appropriate course would have been for the petitioner to have contest the matter in statutory hierarchy and when no cause arose for the same be abjured in favour of writ jurisdiction. Mr. Khalid Hussain, advocate holding brief for Mr. Aamir Ali Memon, advocate for the petitioner and requests for adjournment for no cogent reason. In view hereof, petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS 1 Per Muhammad Ali Mazhar J. in CIR vs. Jahangir Khan Tareen reported as 2022 SCMR 92.
